'''Moje''' was a [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Junior Representative/Legends|Associate Planetary Representative]] to [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Navi]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When King [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] and his people joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the galactic conflict, Moje and Navi planned to kill [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi Council/Legends|Council]] during the [[Battle of Thustra]]. After Navi was arrested for his attempt to have [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] killed, Moje escaped and was placed onto the "wanted" list.
